evidence_rows.reading: V1.12C opened lawfully as a bounded comparison-design phase.
The first baseline's main weakness is now explicit rather than anecdotal.
The first black-box sidecar comparison basis is frozen on the same dataset and same validation split.

interpretation: V1.12C succeeds once the current baseline weakness is localized and the next comparison rules are frozen.
That is enough to stop without auto-running a sidecar model in the same turn.
The next lawful move is owner review of the hotspot map and the sidecar scope.
